commits.subject: P10.4 follow-up: await identity extends to non-Promise heap T (Array, BigInt)
fix(console): coerce_to_str supports Type::Any (catch param, dynobj lookup, etc.)
P10.4-A2: await rejected Promise throws the rejection reason (was: silent return 0)
P10.4: await on non-Promise primitive (Number / String / Boolean) per ES spec
P10.3-A2: async fn accepts idiomatic Promise<T> return annotation (not just inner-T)
P10.3-A1: for-await-of narrow MVP on Array<Promise<T>>
fix(ssa_lower): await on Index / Member / nested expr — extend Promise-source whitelist via expr_types (P10.3 prereq)
progress: P10.2 close + P9.4 follow-ups · bench 3-pass median + dashboard refresh (HEAD 301c826)
fix(regex): s.matchAll(re) throws TypeError when re lacks g flag (P9.4 follow-up)
fix(regex): RegExp.prototype.test() honors sticky/global lastIndex (P9.4 follow-up)
P10.2-DONE: roadmap close · A3 + A4 ship narrative · five gates monotonic 654→658
